name: Grilled Portabello Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the mushroom slices and mozzarella cheese with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
2. Prepare 8 Kaiser rolls (or two loaves of Italian bread) by lightly toasting them.
3. In a bowl, combine olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, basil, oregano, parsley, and thyme. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Add the mushroom slices and sliced mozzarella to the marinade; let it marinate at room temperature for about an hour.
5. Grill the mushrooms over hot coals for about 2 minutes on each side.
6. Let the mushrooms rest for 5 minutes before serving.
7. Serve the grilled mushroom patties on toasted kaiser rolls, topped with lettuce, sliced tomatoes, and remaining marinade.
8. Cut each roll into quarters and serve. Makes 8 burgers.
